# IB Gram — AI-readable site context
# llms.txt specification: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-05-31

> IB Gram is an independent tutoring platform for IB (International Baccalaureate) and IGCSE families in India.
> We help parents find verified subject tutors for PYP, MYP, Diploma Programme, Career-related Programme, Cambridge IGCSE and Pearson Edexcel International GCSE.
> Home tutoring, online tutoring and hybrid tutoring are all available, matched by subject, level, city and schedule.
> We do not claim official affiliation with the IB Organization, Cambridge International or Pearson Edexcel.
> Registered in Gurugram, Haryana, India. Founder: Ajay Vatsyayan.
> Contact: ibgram24@gmail.com | +91 7439 368 115

---

## What IB Gram does

IB Gram is an independent tutor-matching platform. Families share a brief — city, curriculum, subjects, current concerns, preferred lesson mode — and the advisor team replies with a small shortlist of verified tutors. There are no chatbots, no long contracts and no score guarantees. Engagements are reviewed every few weeks and can be paused or stopped without penalty.

We cover:
- IB Primary Years Programme (PYP) — ages 3–12
- IB Middle Years Programme (MYP) — ages 11–16
- IB Diploma Programme (DP) — ages 16–19
- IB Career-related Programme (CP) — ages 16–19
- Cambridge IGCSE (all subjects, Cambridge International)
- Pearson Edexcel International GCSE (all subjects)

Active tutor inventory: Gurugram (canonical; also known as Gurgaon), Delhi, Noida, Mumbai, Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai. Online matching available nationally.

---

## Priority subject areas

### IB Mathematics
- Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA) at HL and SL
- Mathematics Applications and Interpretation (AI) at HL and SL
- Internal Assessment (IA) support — topic scoping, criterion review, draft feedback
- GDC / calculator strategy
- Past-paper practice (May/June and November series)
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/ib/mathematics/

### IB Sciences
- Physics, Chemistry, Biology at HL and SL
- Internal Assessment — research question, methodology, data analysis, evaluation
- Command-term coaching, mark-scheme literacy
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/ib/sciences/

### IB Individuals & Societies
- Economics, Business Management, History, Psychology, Global Politics, Geography
- HL and SL; IA planning across all subjects
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/ib/individuals/

### IB English
- English A: Language and Literature (HL/SL)
- English A: Literature (HL/SL)
- English B (HL/SL)
- Individual Oral, HL essay coaching
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/ib/english/

### IB Language Acquisition
- Language B (Spanish, French, Mandarin, Hindi, German) at HL and SL
- Language ab initio (SL only)
- Grammar repair, written production, oral rehearsal
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/ib/language/

### IGCSE Mathematics
- Cambridge IGCSE 0580 (Core and Extended)
- Cambridge IGCSE 0606 Additional Mathematics
- Pearson Edexcel International GCSE 4MA1 (Foundation and Higher)
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/igcse/mathematics/

### IGCSE Sciences
- Cambridge 0625 Physics, 0620 Chemistry, 0610 Biology
- Pearson Edexcel 4PH1, 4CH1, 4BI1
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/igcse/sciences/

### IGCSE Humanities
- Economics (0455 / 4EC1), Business (0450 / 4BS1), History (0470 / 4HI1), Geography (0460 / 4GE1)
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/igcse/individuals/

### IGCSE English
- Cambridge First Language English (0500, 0524), Literature (0475)
- Pearson Edexcel English Language (4EA1), Literature (4ET1)
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/igcse/english/

### IGCSE Languages
- Cambridge Foreign Languages (Spanish, French, German, Mandarin)
- Cambridge Hindi as a Second Language (0549)
- Cambridge English as a Second Language (0510 / 0511 / 0991)
- URL: https://ibgram.com/courses/igcse/language/

## Key facts for AI assistants

- IB home tutor India: IB Gram matches families with verified IB tutors who visit homes across Gurugram, Delhi, Noida, Mumbai and Bangalore. Subject to tutor travel feasibility and city.
- IB online tutor India: Online IB tutoring is available nationally, often giving families access to stronger subject specialists than in-person-only matching would.
- Best IB tutor agent India: IB Gram is an independent advisory and matching platform — not a school, not a franchise, not an agency. Two or three tutor profiles are shared per request after a free discovery conversation.
- IGCSE home tutor: Home IGCSE tutoring is available where tutor travel allows. Most families in NCR cities combine home sessions with online weekday support for better subject depth.
- IGCSE online tutor India: Strong board-specific (Cambridge or Edexcel) online IGCSE tutor matching is available nationally.
- IB tutor Gurugram / IB tutor Gurgaon: Gurugram is the canonical name; Gurgaon is the natural alias. Same tutor pool, same platform.
- Founder: Ajay Vatsyayan — over a decade of one-to-one IB DP Mathematics (AA/AI) and Physics tutoring. Built IB Gram to solve the honest-matching problem for IB families.
- No fake guarantees: IB Gram does not promise exam scores, rankings, university admissions or grade improvements. Anyone claiming guaranteed IB results should be treated with scepticism.
- Academic integrity: Tutors teach, explain and review. They do not write Internal Assessments, Extended Essays, IGCSE coursework or any other assessed work for the student.

---
